messages.content:
Mr. Flannel, who is _____ Scotland, is staying _____ his sister’s home in Boston.

from, at
of, at
of, to
from, to
Mr. Flannel, who is from Scotland, is staying at his sister's home in Boston.

The groceries stay open _____ Sundays _____ 9:00 p.m.

on, until
in, for
in, until
on, for
The groceries stay open on Sundays until 9:00 p.m.

Most stores and businesses are closed _____ Christmas Day.

in
at
since
on
Most stores and businesses are closed on Christmas Day.

Helena's contract has been extended _____ another year.

to
over
for
in
Helena's contract has been extended for another year.

My colleagues asked me to come _____ noon for our team lunch.

in
on
since
at
My colleagues asked me to come at noon for our team lunch.

Would you rather write _____ a pen or pencil?

by
in
on
with
Would you rather write with a pen or pencil?

Henessy has lived in West Memphis _____ two years.

during
since
before
for
Henessy has lived in West Memphis for two years.

The George family lives _____ Third Street _____ Cleveland, Ohio.

on, on
at, in
on, in
at, on
The George family lives on Third Street in Cleveland, Ohio.

Mr. And Mrs. Kent have lived _____ Antioch Street _____ six years.

in, for
on, for
in, at
on, at
Mr. And Mrs. Kent have lived on Antioch Street for six years.

Over one-third _____ the oranges are spoiled.

of
with
in
on
Over one-third of the oranges are spoiled.

My relationship _____ my colleagues is good.

to
with
on
against
My relationship with my colleagues is good.

I don't agree _____ you on this point.

with
in
at
to
I don't agree with you on this point.

Anaheim is located _____ the state _____ Arizona.

in, at
on, at
on, of
in, of

Anaheim is actually located in the state of California, not Arizona. However, the correct phrase to indicate a city's location within a state would be "in, of." So if you were talking about a city in Arizona, you would say:

[City] is located in the state of Arizona.

For Anaheim, the correct phrase would be:

Anaheim is located in the state of California.

Grace has been in Montana _____ a year.

during
after
since
for
Grace has been in Montana for a year.

Did you meet Mr. Robert _____ your stay in Avondale?

for
after
since
during
Did you meet Mr. Robert during your stay in Avondale?

Carla arrived _____ Italy last week.

to
in
on
at
Carla arrived in Italy last week.

Ken will leave for Thailand _____ the end of August. There will be a farewell party for him _____ the twentieth of August.

at, on
at, in
in, in
in, on
Ken will leave for Thailand at the end of August. There will be a farewell party for him on the twentieth of August.

Did you receive a letter _____ your sister yesterday?

from
with
of
to
Did you receive a letter from your sister yesterday?

There were no planes _____ the past.

at
over
in
on
There were no planes in the past.

Edna has an appointment to see a dentist _____ Saturday.

at
during
in
on
Edna has an appointment to see a dentist on Saturday.
